content:
💡 git-guide | HTML
🎯 Primary Use Case: To serve as a comprehensive, easily accessible reference guide for learning and using Git version control system.
✨ Key Features: • Comprehensive Git commands and examples • Beginner to advanced topics • Branching and merging strategies • Conflict resolution guides • Online interactive version (MkDocs)
📖 Summary: This repository provides a comprehensive guide and cheatsheet for Git, covering everything from basic installation and commands to advanced techniques like rebasing, conflict resolution, and branching strategies. It aims to be a daily reference for developers of all skill levels.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
